title: Triolet
content:
Oh that men would praise the Lord
        For his goodness unto men!
    Forth he sends his saving word,
        --Oh that men would praise the Lord!--
    And from shades of death abhorred
        Lifts them up to light again:
    Oh that men would praise the Lord
        For his goodness unto men!
meaning:
This evocative piece by George MacDonald, titled "Triolet", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
